content:
import this reocrds in the odoo

[Excel file attached: **invoices_summary.csv**]
Rows: 3 | Columns (3): name, partner_id, amount_total
file_id: 58f4b8abee0b

IMPORT THIS FILE INTO ODOO NOW.
Step 1: call excel_query with file_id="58f4b8abee0b" to read ALL rows.
Step 2: create/import the records in Odoo (odoo_create etc.).
Do NOT stop after saying you will read the file — execute the tools and complete the import.

[CSV/Excel IMPORT — file_id=58f4b8abee0b]
MANDATORY: Call excel_query FIRST, then import ALL rows into Odoo.
Do NOT reply with only a plan — execute tools and finish the import in this turn.

All 3 invoices have been created successfully! Here's a summary:

| # | Invoice ID | Customer | Amount | Status |
|---|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Draft Invoice (ID 36) | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | Draft |
| 2 | Draft Invoice (ID 37) | **Sonal** | $7,890.00 | Draft |
| 3 | Draft Invoice (ID 38) | **ABC CUSTOMER SVC.** | $7,890.00 | Draft |

All 3 records from your CSV file have been imported into Odoo as **draft customer invoices**. They are ready to be reviewed and posted. Would you like me to open any of them, or post them to make them official?
